assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Repository Registry' section with the table headers (Repository, Role, Serena Instance, Path) but no data rows, or explicitly notes that no repositories are configured
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 3-6 contain '## Repository Registry' followed by the table headers '| Repository | Role | Serena Instance | Path |' and the separator '|---|---|---|---|' with no data rows beneath.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Jira Configuration' section with Project key (MYPROJ), Cloud ID (abc123), and Feature issue type ID (10001)
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 8-11 contain '## Jira Configuration' with '- Project key: MYPROJ', '- Cloud ID: abc123', and '- Feature issue type ID: 10001'.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Code Intelligence' section that indicates no Serena instances are configured
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 13-20 contain '## Code Intelligence' followed by 'No Serena MCP servers are configured. Code intelligence is not available.' and '### Limitations' with 'No limitations known — no Serena instances configured.'

assertion_results.text: outputs/discovery-log.md documents that no Serena MCP tools were discovered among the available tools
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md lines 9-13 under 'Step 2 — Discover Serena Instances' state: 'No Serena tools found (no tools matching mcp__<instance>__find_symbol, get_symbols_overview, search_for_pattern, or replace_symbol_body patterns)'.

assertion_results.text: outputs/discovery-log.md documents that no Atlassian MCP tools were discovered and Jira fields were provided via manual entry
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md lines 20-24 under 'Step 3.1 — Attempt MCP First' state: 'Checked for Atlassian MCP tools (tools prefixed with mcp__atlassian__)' and 'No Atlassian MCP tools found among available tools'. Lines 27-28 under 'Step 3.2 — Handle MCP Failure' state: 'No Atlassian MCP available — prompted user for approach' and 'User chose manual entry (option 2)'. Lines 30-36 under 'Step 3.4 — Manual Entry' document the manually provided values.

assertion_results.text: The output or discovery log mentions prompting the user about continuing without code intelligence (the skill should ask whether to continue or set up Serena first)
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md line 14 states: 'Informed user: "No Serena MCP servers were found. Would you like to continue without code intelligence or set up Serena first?"' and line 15 states: 'User chose to continue without code intelligence'.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Bug Configuration' section with three fields: Bug issue type ID (10001), Bug template (docs/bug-template.md), Bug-to-Task link type (Blocks)
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 22-26 contain '## Bug Configuration' with '- Bug issue type ID: 10001', '- Bug template: docs/bug-template.md', and '- Bug-to-Task link type: Blocks'.

assertion_results.text: The skill offers Security Configuration opt-in and respects the user's decline — outputs/claude-md-result.md does NOT contain a '## Security Configuration' section
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md lines 85-90 under 'Step 10 — Security Configuration' document: 'Asked user: "Would you like to enable security triage for this project?"' and 'User declined' and 'Security Configuration skipped'. claude-md-result.md does not contain any '## Security Configuration' section — the file ends after the Bug Configuration section at line 27.
